text: CALIBRATION OF RADIOCARBON AGE TO CALENDAR YEARS MARIA (Variables: C13/C12 = -19.3 o/oo: lab. mult = 1) Laboratory number Beta-464741: BTM Conventional radiocarbon age 1750 + 30 BP Calibrated Result (95% Probability) Cal AD 245 to 410 (Cal BP 1705 to 1540) Intercept of radiocarbon age with calibration Cal AD 360 (Cal BP 1590) curve Calibrated Result (68% Probability) Cal AD 250 to 295 (Cal BP 1700 to 1655) Cal AD 335 to 375 (Cal BP 1615 to 1575) 1750 + 30 BP Tissue 1850 -+ 1825 4 1800 5 Radiocarbon age (BP) 1700 - 1675 5 1650 - Cal AD Database used SHCAL13 References Mathematics used for calibration scenario A Simplified Approach to Calibrating C14 Dates, Talma, A. S., Vogel, J. C., 1993, Radiocarbon 35(2):31 7-322 References to SHCAL13 database Hogg AG, Hua Q, Blackwell PG, Niu M, Buck CE, Guilderson TP, Heaton TJ, Palmer JG, Reimer PJ, Reimer RW, Turney CSM, Zimmerman SRH. 2013. SHCal13 Southern Hemisphere calibration, O-50,000 years cal BP. Radiocarbon 55(4):1889-1903.
